cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which penguin is younger than Louis. First, I need to find out Louis's age. From the table, Louis is 7 years old. So I need to look at the other penguins and see if any of them are younger than 7. Looking at the list: - Bernard is 5 years old. That's younger than Louis's 7. - Vincent is 9, which is older. - Gwen is 8, also older. - The options also include James, but there's no data for James in the table, so probably not him. So Bernard is the only one younger than Louis. Let me check again to make sure I didn't miss anything. Louis
